name: Price unit of measure
description: Price unit of measure is the unit of measure in which Price is reported.
optionalityRules: Price unit of measure is only reported when Price is reported as a monetary amount.
Required if Price notation is 1 and Price unit of measure is required to be reported.
Values are not reported for the not-reported Action types.
valueRules: Where Price is reported as a decimal, its units are taken to be the same units as Notional amount—Leg 1.
Price unit of measure is reported as the same code as for Quantity unit of measure—Leg 1, taking into account the guidance in paragraphs 330–333.

For a CFD or other forward over a debt security or over an exchange-traded debt future or option, for Price reported as a monetary amount, the fit-for-purpose ExternalUnitOfMeasure1Code is ACCY ‘AmountOfCurrency’.
If reported, the formats of the values conform to the 2024 Rules specifications.
